summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 17 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 88 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 62 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 20 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 28 days past due with 17 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **28 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $30,515 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 10 days past due with 15 total — this schedule needs a reset. **CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** 1 upcoming task still unassigned.

178 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **89 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 33 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$71,254 in payments going out this week** across 35 tasks — make sure funds are available. $21,405 expected in from 4 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Stephanie and Marc Felton and Ginger Brown — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 26. Keep the momentum going.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 15 overdue (oldest: 10d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 13 overdue (oldest: 23d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 10 overdue (oldest: 12d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. 2 upcoming unassigned. 13 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
